channel.title: Reverse-Engineering on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in Reverse-Engineering on Alien Truth Social

item.title: Bob Lazar
item.description:
Bob Lazar is an American businessman who gained notoriety in 1989 after claiming to have worked on the reverse engineering of extraterrestrial technology at a secret site near Area 51. Investigative reporting and academic scrutiny have largely discredited his assertions, citing a lack of evidence and significant fabrications regarding his education and employment history. Despite these findings, his claims remain a central element in modern UFO conspiracy theories. Lazar has also faced legal issues, including a 1990 conviction for felony pandering and a 2006 guilty plea concerning the illegal sale of hazardous chemicals.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bob_Lazar

item.title: Pentagon Reopens Search for Alleged ‘Yankee Blue’ Memo After Initial Denial
item.description:
A FOIA appellate decision has ordered the Department of War to conduct additional searches for a 2023 memorandum. This memorandum was reportedly issued by the Secretary of Defense’s office to halt an Air Force hazing ritual called “Yankee Blue,” which involved fabricated claims of reverse-engineering non-human technology. Initially, the Department of War stated no such memorandum was found, but the appeal has now been granted, requiring a new search. The original Wall Street Journal article described the alleged directive but did not publish the memo or provide specific sourcing.

Source: https://www.theblackvault.com/documentarchive/pentagon-reopens-search-for-alleged-yankee-blue-memo-after-initial-denial
